title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: the easiest way to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other open-source models locally with a single CLI and Docker-style API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—browser and Node.js ready.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chains, agents and retrieval.

title: Ollama WebUI
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (Docker one-liner) with multi-user, markdown, code highlighting.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client SDK for Ollama; sync & async, fluent builder, Android compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama REST API with ActiveModel-style interface and streaming.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting and history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code-completion service for VS Code.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Camunda 8 connector that calls Ollama for human-task summarization or DMN decisions.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to chat or generate text with any Ollama model inside workflows.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that adds a side-panel chat powered by your local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker image and example compose stacks with GPU & CPU variants.

title: ollama-rag-elastic
summary: Elasticsearch notebook showing RAG pattern using Ollama embeddings + Llama 2.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Lightweight Rust crate wrapping Ollama REST endpoints with async/await support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client for Ollama with strongly-typed models and System.Text.Json.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service for CI pipelines (Python SDK).

title: ollama-rag-redis
summary: Real-time RAG sample using Redis vector search + Ollama embeddings and chat.
